title: Better Farming with Hoes
description: Allows for a higher amount of breakage when using better hoes and replacing when in your offhand.
body: # Better Farming with Hoes ** Please let me know if there is any issues with 26.1 Thank you! ** This data pack makes farming using hoes overpowered. When holding a hoe in the offhand it will replant all broken crops, and when in mainhand it will just break. The better the hoe, the bigger radius is broken. For example: - Wooden Hoe - 1 block - Stone, Copper(1.21.9+) and Golden Hoes - 5 blocks - Iron and Diamond hoe - 9 blocks - Netherite - 13 blocks This pack is made to make your farming experience all the more fun! Hope you can get as much fun out of this as I had making it! This data pack is a fork of my friends data pack: [Farm 3x3](https://modrinth.com/datapack/farm-3x3)
